folio.label: 95v
folio.l: And cometú hom , as sone as euäe she may
For wel she had herd sey , that thilke day
The Markys shuld wedde , and if she mygút
She wolde fayn han sen , som of that sigút
¢ She thougút I wyl , witú othere Maydenes stonde
That ben myne felawes , in oure dore and se
The Markysesse , and therfore wol I fonde
To do at hom , as sone as it may be
The labour , whicú that longetú vn to me
And thanne I may , at leyser hire byholde
If she this weye , vn to the Castel holde
¢ And as she wolde , ouer the threswold gon

note.notetxt: 288There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: The Markys cam , and gan hire for to calle
And she sette doun , hire watir pot a noon
Beside the threswold , in an oxes stalle
And doun vp on hire knees , she gan to falle
And witú sad countenaunce , knelitú stille
Til she had herd , what was the lordis wylle
¢ This thougútful Markys , spak vn to this mayde
Ful soberly , and seide in this manere
Where is ©oure fader , Grisildis he seyde
And she witú reuerence , in humble cheere
Answered , lord , he is al redy heere
And In she gotú , witú outen lengere lette
And to the Markys , she hire fader fette
¢ He by the hond , than toke this poore man
And seide thus , whan he hi~ had a syde
Ianycula , I neyther may ne can
Lengere the plesaunce , of myn hert hyde
If that thow vouchesaf , what so betyde
Thy dougúter wol I take , er that I wende
As for my wyf , vn to hire lyues ende
¢ Thow louest me , that wot I wel certeyn
And art my feitúful liege man , I bore
And al that lyketú me , I dar wel seyn
It lyketú the , and specially therfore
Telle me that poynt , that I haue seid byfore
If that thow wylt , vn to that purpos drawe
To take me , as for thyn sone in lawe
¢ This sodeyn caas , the man a stoyned so
That red he wex a baist , and al quakynge
He stod , vnethe seide he wordes moo
But oonly thus , lord q¶ he my wyllynge
Is as ©e wole , ne a ©eyns ©oure likynge
I wyl no thyngö , myn owen lord so deere
Rygút as ©ow lyst , gouernetú this matere
